Plastic Bottle.recycle: Rinse and place it in the plastic recycling bin.
Plastic Bottle.reuse: Use as a plant pot, bird feeder, or pencil holder.

Old Phone.recycle: Take it to an electronics recycling facility.
Old Phone.reuse: Use as a dedicated music player or home security camera.

Clothes.recycle: Donate to thrift stores or recycling centers.
Clothes.reuse: Turn into cleaning rags or pillow stuffing.

Paper.recycle: Place in the paper recycling bin.
Paper.reuse: Use for origami, scrapbooking, or as gift wrap.

Glass Bottle.recycle: Rinse and place it in the glass recycling bin.
Glass Bottle.reuse: Use as a vase, candle holder, or decorative piece.

Cardboard Box.recycle: Flatten and place in the cardboard recycling bin.
Cardboard Box.reuse: Use for organizing or as a storage box.

Aluminum Can.recycle: Rinse and place in the aluminum recycling bin.
Aluminum Can.reuse: Use as a plant pot, coin holder, or pencil holder.

Old T-Shirt.recycle: Donate to charity or use as a rag.
Old T-Shirt.reuse: Turn into a tote bag or pillow cover.

Old Shoes.recycle: Donate or take to a recycling center.
Old Shoes.reuse: Use as planters or as a quirky display.

Egg Carton.recycle: Place in the paper recycling bin.
Egg Carton.reuse: Use for organizing small items or as a craft project.

Plastic Bags.recycle: Take to a plastic recycling drop-off site.
Plastic Bags.reuse: Use as trash bags or for organizing items.
